vocab.example: I have a keen interest in architectural photography, especially capturing the contrast between old and new structures.

vocab.meaning: sự đối xứng về hình học
vocab.example: I often take photos of modern buildings because I'm fascinated by their precise geometrical symmetry.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế tiên phong, phá cách
vocab.example: Whenever I travel, I look for buildings with avant-garde design to add some unique shots to my gallery.

vocab.meaning: kết cấu nhuốm màu thời gian/phong hóa
vocab.example: I prefer photographing ancient ruins as the weathered texture of the stones tells a compelling story of the past.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen/đối lập giữa các thời đại
vocab.example: My favorite photos usually feature a juxtaposition of eras, such as a glass skyscraper reflecting a gothic cathedral.
To me, taking pictures of local landmarks is a form of visual storytelling that documents how my city is evolving.

vocab.meaning: các chi tiết chạm trổ tinh xảo
vocab.example: I often zoom in to capture the intricate detailing on the facades of colonial-era buildings.
The monolithic presence of the new national library makes it a perfect subject for wide-angle photography.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen giữa ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: I love how the play of light and shadow on a building's surface can completely transform its appearance at sunset.
I frequently photograph high-rises to capture the dynamic and vibrant essence of the urban landscape.
